_comment: Selector list for scripts/css-page-report.mjs. The crawler injects
scripts/browser-inspect.js and runs __inspect over these selectors on every
route × theme (HEADED, faithful render). Start narrow (buttons) and widen to
other primitives (panels, cards, inputs, modals) as the cleanup progresses.
Each selector should target a rendered primitive whose CSS we want to map and
eventually consolidate. Add raw alias classes where they are NOT <Button>.
_flows_comment: Interaction sequences that reveal primitives with NO standalone URL —
portaled modals, overlays, panels opened behind a click. Each flow runs on
ONE route per theme: goto route (+ optional query), run steps, then inspect
with the GLOBAL selectors (plus any flow-only selectors). Output is keyed as
recommended so the portal has mounted before inspection.
WHY THIS MATTERS: portaled modals render OUTSIDE their opener's DOM subtree,
glassPrimaryButtonToneClassName) silently breaks — a class of bug the plain
route crawl is blind to because it never opens the modal.
